[✓] Create src/features/publicApiIntegration/ai/classify.ts with AI classification and generation functions

- **`classifyAndSave(contentId, title, content, contentType, config)`** — Runs classification and persists results (topic, skill, difficulty, tags, `aiClassification`) to IndexedDB via `DatabaseService.updatePublicApiContent`
- **`extractVocabulary(content, config)`** — Extracts IELTS vocabulary with definitions, part-of-speech, examples, synonyms, and collocations
- **`generateListeningExercise(content, config)`** — Creates listening gap-fill exercises from transcripts
- **`generateReadingQuestions(content, title, config)`** — Generates reading questions (multiple-choice, true/false/not given, sentence completion, etc.)
- **`generateSpeakingPrompts(content, config)`** — Generates speaking prompts for Parts 1-3
- **`generateWritingIdeas(content, config)`** — Creates writing Task 1 and Task 2 prompts
- **`classifyContent(request, config)`** — Classifies imported content by IELTS topic, skill, difficulty, and tags; returns vocabulary, summary, key phrases, and questions
- **`generateMistakeReviewTasks(content, config)`** — Creates mistake review tasks across vocabulary, grammar, pronunciation, coherence, and task-achievement
- All AI functions require explicit `AiProviderConfig` (apiKey, baseUrl, model) — no auto-triggering
- API keys stored in `localStorage` with `ielts-ai-*` prefix, never in code
- Response parsing uses JSON extraction with safe fallback
- Uses OpenAI-compatible `/chat/completions` endpoint (works with OpenAI, local LLMs, etc.)
- `classifyAndSave` is the only function that writes to IndexedDB — user must explicitly call it
**Also added** `updatePublicApiContent` method to `DatabaseService` at `src/services/storage/Database.ts:914` for updating classification metadata in IndexedDB.
No pre-existing tests found for the `publicApiIntegration` feature — `pnpm test --filter publicApiIntegration` would have nothing to run.
